action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate=0.002 (only 2% in FourRooms, 0 elsewhere) after 500k steps; post-train eval also ~0 due to small sample. Analysis: Multi-task round-robin gives ~50k steps/env which is insufficient for most Minigrid tasks (key/door/lava navigation needs more); FlatObsWrapper+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO pipeline is correct and stable (DummyVecEnv fixed prior multiprocessing bug), but severely undertrained; iteration time ~2.7min allows scaling. Decision: Increase to 2M timesteps (~4x, expect ~5-6min runtime), bump eval n_episodes=5 for reliable logging, keep all else (hyperparams, wrappers, 8 vec envs) identical for direct comparison; submit_eval immediately after to track gains on easy envs like DoorKey/FourRooms.
